goals: Discover what unit conversion categories are available for story research
Explore units in the length category for space distance calculations
Convert a space distance for story accuracy (light-years to kilometers)
Convert a speed measurement for spaceship velocity in story

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and creative, focused on scientific accuracy for entertainment storytelling. Likes to explore and understand scale for immersive world-building.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows general concepts of units and measurements but does not know specific tool names or APIs. Familiar with sci-fi concepts like light-years and spaceship speeds but needs precise conversions for realism.

end_condition: The user has completed all conversion goals and has the numerical information needed for their story research.
